title: Suhbaatar Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Suhbaatar with a Z-Score of -4.66. This event has been categorized as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Suhbaatar are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity at 75% and moderate winds at 3.7 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 17.3 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
